response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with a current role explicitly involving TypeScript, Node.js, React, AI-agent infrastructure, and MCP tooling — a direct hit on the role's primary stack and the AI agent requirement. Strong track record across backend, frontend, databases, DevOps, and testing/TDD culture, with demonstrated ownership of complex systems at scale.
strengths: Direct match on TS/Node/React stack plus current AI-agent and MCP work
Senior-level breadth: backend, frontend, DevOps, databases, and architecture
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure (mostly older roles)
Cloud experience skews AWS; GCP/Azure depth unclear
